recommendations.title: The Basketball Diaries
recommendations.overview: A high school basketball player’s life turns upside down after free-falling into the harrowing world of drug addiction.

recommendations.title: Dutch
recommendations.overview: To get to know his girlfriend's son, a man volunteers to pick him up from a prep school... only to learn that her son's not the nicest kid.

recommendations.title: Hot Girls Wanted
recommendations.overview: A first-ever look at the realities of the professional “amateur” porn world and the steady stream of 18-to-19-year old girls entering into it.

recommendations.title: Afterschool
recommendations.overview: A prep-school student accidentally films the drug-related deaths of two classmates, then is asked to put together a memorial video.

recommendations.title: Above the Rim
recommendations.overview: Story of a promising high school basketball star and his relationships with two brothers, one a drug dealer and the other a former basketball star fallen on hard times and now employed as a security guard.

recommendations.title: The Hate U Give
recommendations.overview: Raised in a poverty-stricken slum, a 16-year-old girl named Starr now attends a suburban prep school. After she witnesses a police officer shoot her unarmed best friend, she's torn between her two very different worlds as she tries to speak her truth

recommendations.title: Father & Soldier
recommendations.overview: 1917. Bakary Diallo enlists in the French army to join his 17-year-old son, Thierno, who has been forcibly recruited. Sent to the front, they will have to face the war together. While Thierno learns to become a man, Bakary will do everything to bring

recommendations.title: Never Back Down: Revolt
recommendations.overview: An amateur fighter is lured by a trafficking syndicate specializing in elite underground fighting where her brutal captor forces her to fight or face certain death.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: The First Slam Dunk
